name: OAuth Server
description: Production-ready OAuth 2.0 authorization server scaffold: Express + TypeScript with access/refresh token flows, optional PKCE, Postgres persistence, Dockerfile, AWS ECS Terraform skeleton, and GitHub Actions CI/CD.

fields.label: Service name
fields.help: Lowercase kebab-case identifier used for the package name, Docker image, and infra resources.

fields.label: Token strategy
fields.help: How tokens are issued. Local JWT mints tokens in-process; External IdP exchanges codes against an upstream provider.

fields.label: PKCE support
fields.help: Enable Proof Key for Code Exchange (RFC 7636) on the authorization code flow.

fields.label: Integrations to wire up
fields.help: Optional third-party integration stubs to scaffold (config loaders, not full SDK wiring).

fields.label: Datastore
fields.help: Backing datastore for clients, authorization codes, and refresh tokens.

fields.label: Interactive API docs
fields.help: Serve an interactive Swagger UI at /docs for testing the OAuth + PKCE flows in-browser.
